backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing users, posts, conversations, permissions, and profile management with access control and stable storage.
backend/migration.mo: Defines old/new actor state types and a migration function that currently returns the old state unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping specific frontend files to implemented features, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of key frontend files across routing, pages, components, and hooks.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind and theme variable definitions for light/dark mode styling using OKLCH color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML file that loads the React app via main.tsx and sets basic metadata.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React file configuring routing, theme provider, auth gating, and onboarding redirection.
frontend/src/auth/AuthGate.tsx: Authentication wrapper that shows loading or login UI before rendering the app's children.
frontend/src/auth/LoginButton.tsx: Internet Identity login/logout button handling authentication flow and clearing query cache on logout.
UI component that displays a post with author info and an optional image carousel.
frontend/src/components/states/EmptyStat: Reusable empty-state component showing an optional illustration, message, and action button.
frontend/src/components/states/ErrorStat: Error display component with message text and an optional retry action.
frontend/src/components/states/LoadingSt: Loading indicator component with spinner and optional message.
frontend/src/explore/ExplorePage.tsx: Implements a user search page with follow, unfollow, and start-conversation actions using query hooks and validation.
frontend/src/feed/FeedPage.tsx: Displays the user feed with loading, error, and empty states and renders posts via PostCard.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches a backend actor tied to the user’s identity and invalidates dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides context and logic for Internet Identity authentication, including loading, login, and managing identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for profiles, posts, search, follow actions, and conversations using the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS base setup defining light and dark theme CSS variables and global styles.
frontend/src/layout/AppLayout.tsx: Defines the main app layout with mobile header, desktop sidebar navigation, and content area.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and InternetIdentityProvider and loads global styles.
frontend/src/messages/ChatThreadPage.tsx: Renders a chat thread with messages, scrolling behavior, error/loading states, and a message composer.
frontend/src/messages/MessageComposer.ts: A message input form that validates content and sends messages using a mutation.
frontend/src/messages/MessagesPage.tsx: Lists user conversations with loading/error states and links to individual conversation pages.
frontend/src/navigation/PrimaryNav.tsx: Main navigation component rendering route links with active state for mobile and desktop layouts.
frontend/src/onboarding/OnboardingPage.t: User onboarding form for collecting display name and username with validation and signup mutation.
frontend/src/posts/CreatePostPage.tsx: Form for creating posts with caption and multiple image URLs, including validation and submission handling.
frontend/src/profile/ProfilePage.tsx: Displays and edits the user's profile with validation, loading/error states, and save functionality.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL and session parameters, including hash-based routing support.
frontend/src/validation/validators.ts: Provides validation functions for usernames, display names, captions, image URL limits, message content, and search terms with length and format rules.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom colors, fonts, animations, container settings, and includes typography, container-query, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Describes the project state, existing features, known issues, and requirements for a social chat and messaging app.
